note: Taxonomy v2 — APPLIED state (phase-a9-taxonomy-v2.sql, 2026-06-10). Restores the owner-preferred 14-top separation from merged-taxonomy.json, improved by live item data. The owner usage-stage rule from phase A8 is preserved: removedor/desengraxante/estopas live in Funilaria › Preparação de Superfície, NOT in Solventes/Higiene. 'A Revisar' is the triage bucket (acct null).
